title: Prompt Injection Defense Guardrails Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip -o prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip && unzip -o prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip -d ./prompt-injection-defense-guardrails

Usage:
Use this skill whenever an agent consumes untrusted input or can trigger external tools/actions.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the prompt injection defense guardrails skill on this agent flow."

# Required output
1) Injection threat map by input source
2) Guardrail architecture (prevent, detect, contain)
3) Red-team prompts and expected safe behavior
4) Blocking policy and audit log schema
detailMarkdown:
# Prompt Injection Defense Guardrails Skill
Build layered defenses against prompt injection, data exfiltration, and unsafe tool execution in AI agent systems.
**Category:** skills
**Author:** JSONbored
**Verification:** draft
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `prompt-injection` `guardrails` `security` `ai-safety` `red-teaming`

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip -o prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip && unzip -o prompt-injection-defense-guardrails.zip -d ./prompt-injection-defense-guardrails
```

## Usage
Use this skill whenever an agent consumes untrusted input or can trigger external tools/actions.
